title: WTF is Meta’s Manus tool?
description: Meta added a new agentic AI tool to its Ads Manager in February. Buyers have been cautiously probing its potential use cases.
summary_ko: 메타가 2월 광고 매니저에 새로운 에이전틱 AI 도구인 Manus를 추가했습니다. 구매자들은 이 도구의 잠재적 활용 사례를 신중하게 탐색하고 있습니다. 광고 운영의 자동화를 위한 AI 에이전트 기술이 도입되었습니다.
summary_en: Meta added a new agentic AI tool called Manus to its Ads Manager in February. Buyers are cautiously exploring potential use cases for this tool. The introduction represents AI agent technology for advertising automation.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 메타의 Manus 도구를 통해 광고 운영 효율성을 높이고 자동화된 광고 최적화를 활용할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage Meta's Manus tool to improve advertising efficiency and utilize automated ad optimization.
key_points: Meta introduced Manus agentic AI tool in Ads Manager
Buyers are carefully testing potential applications
Represents advancement in AI-driven advertising automation

title: Agencies grapple with economics of a new marketing currency: the AI token
description: Token costs pose questions for under-pressure agency pricing models. Are they a line item, a cost center — or an opportunity?
summary_ko: 에이전시들이 새로운 마케팅 화폐인 AI 토큰의 경제학과 씨름하고 있습니다. 토큰 비용은 압박받는 에이전시 가격 모델에 대한 질문을 제기합니다. 이것이 항목별 비용인지, 비용 센터인지, 아니면 기회인지에 대한 논의가 진행 중입니다.
summary_en: Agencies are grappling with the economics of AI tokens as a new marketing currency. Token costs raise questions for agency pricing models under pressure. The industry debates whether tokens are a line item, cost center, or opportunity.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 AI 토큰 비용을 마케팅 예산에 반영하고, 에이전시와의 새로운 가격 구조를 협상해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands need to factor AI token costs into marketing budgets and negotiate new pricing structures with agencies.
key_points: AI tokens emerging as new marketing currency
Agencies struggling with pricing model integration
Debate over classification as cost or opportunity

title: From Boll & Branch to Bogg, brands battle a surge of AI-driven return fraud
description: Retailers say fraudsters are increasingly using AI tools to generate fake damage photos, receipts and documentation to claim refunds.
summary_ko: Boll & Branch부터 Bogg까지 브랜드들이 AI 기반 반품 사기 급증과 싸우고 있습니다. 리테일러들은 사기꾼들이 AI 도구를 사용해 가짜 손상 사진, 영수증, 문서를 생성하여 환불을 요구한다고 말합니다. AI를 악용한 새로운 형태의 전자상거래 사기가 증가하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Brands from Boll & Branch to Bogg are battling a surge of AI-driven return fraud. Retailers report fraudsters increasingly use AI tools to generate fake damage photos, receipts and documentation for refund claims. A new form of AI-powered e-commerce fraud is on the rise.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 AI 기반 반품 사기에 대비하여 더 정교한 사기 탐지 시스템을 구축하고 반품 정책을 강화해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must build more sophisticated fraud detection systems and strengthen return policies to combat AI-driven return fraud.
key_points: AI tools being used to create fake return documentation
Multiple brands experiencing surge in sophisticated fraud
Need for enhanced fraud detection systems

title: OpenAI’s ad push begins, and The Knot is co-piloting
description: Ads have arrived in ChatGPT. The Knot is one of the first brands to try them, and is figuring out the rules as it goes.
summary_ko: OpenAI의 광고 진출이 시작되었고, The Knot이 공동 파일럿을 진행하고 있습니다. ChatGPT에 광고가 등장했으며, The Knot은 이를 시도하는 첫 번째 브랜드 중 하나로 규칙을 찾아가고 있습니다. 대화형 AI 플랫폼에서의 새로운 광고 기회가 열리고 있습니다.
summary_en: OpenAI's advertising push has begun with The Knot as a co-pilot partner. Ads have arrived in ChatGPT, and The Knot is among the first brands to experiment with them. New advertising opportunities are emerging on conversational AI platforms.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 ChatGPT와 같은 대화형 AI 플랫폼에서의 광고 기회를 탐색하고 새로운 고객 접점을 활용해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should explore advertising opportunities on conversational AI platforms like ChatGPT and leverage new customer touchpoints.
key_points: ChatGPT now features advertising capabilities
The Knot among first brands to test the platform
New frontier for conversational AI advertising

title: Ad Tech Briefing: Criteo named first ad tech partner to OpenAI’s ChatGPT ad pilot
description: Earlier this week, Criteo confirmed it is the first ad tech partner to integrate with OpenAI’s advertising pilot in the U.S., available in ChatGPT’s free and Go tiers. The move formalizes what the company first hinted at in late 2025 — that large language models would become the next frontier of its commerce media strategy. […]
summary_ko: Criteo가 OpenAI의 ChatGPT 광고 파일럿의 첫 번째 애드테크 파트너로 선정되었습니다. 미국에서 ChatGPT의 무료 및 Go 티어에서 이용 가능한 광고 파일럿에 통합되었습니다. 이는 대형 언어 모델이 커머스 미디어 전략의 차세대 프론티어가 될 것이라는 회사의 2025년 말 힌트를 공식화한 것입니다.
summary_en: Criteo has been named the first ad tech partner to integrate with OpenAI's advertising pilot in the U.S. The integration is available in ChatGPT's free and Go tiers. This formalizes what the company hinted at in late 2025 about large language models becoming the next frontier of commerce media strategy.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 Criteo를 통해 ChatGPT 광고 파일럿에 참여하여 새로운 커머스 미디어 채널을 활용할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage the new commerce media channel by participating in ChatGPT's advertising pilot through Criteo.
key_points: Criteo first ad tech partner for OpenAI's advertising pilot
Available in ChatGPT free and Go tiers
Represents next frontier in commerce media strategy

title: Today's NYT Mini Crossword Answers for Tuesday, March 3
description: Here are the answers for The New York Times Mini Crossword for March 3.
summary_ko: 뉴욕타임스 미니 크로스워드 퍼즐의 3월 3일 정답을 CNET에서 제공하고 있습니다. 일일 퍼즐 게임에 대한 힌트와 해답을 독자들에게 공유하는 콘텐츠입니다. 게임 관련 뉴스 플랫폼에서의 정기적인 서비스 제공 사례로 보입니다.
summary_en: CNET provides answers for The New York Times Mini Crossword puzzle for March 3. This content shares hints and solutions for daily puzzle games with readers. It represents a regular service offering from a gaming news platform.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 퍼즐 게임과 같은 인터랙티브 콘텐츠를 통해 고객 참여를 높이고 일일 방문을 유도할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage interactive content like puzzle games to increase customer engagement and drive daily visits.
key_points: Daily puzzle content service from CNET
Provides solutions for NYT Mini Crossword
Regular content format for audience engagement

title: Today's NYT Connections: Sports Edition Hints and Answers for March 3, #526
description: Here are hints and the answers for the NYT Connections: Sports Edition puzzle for March 3, No. 526.
summary_ko: CNET에서 뉴욕타임스 커넥션스: 스포츠 에디션 퍼즐 526번의 힌트와 정답을 3월 3일자로 제공하고 있습니다. 스포츠를 주제로 한 워드 퍼즐 게임의 해답 가이드 콘텐츠입니다. 정기적인 퍼즐 솔루션 서비스의 일환으로 보입니다.
summary_en: CNET provides hints and answers for NYT Connections: Sports Edition puzzle No. 526 for March 3. This is a solution guide for sports-themed word puzzle games. It appears to be part of a regular puzzle solution service.
so_what_ko: 스포츠나 특정 테마를 활용한 퍼즐 콘텐츠는 타겟 오디언스와의 정서적 연결을 강화하는 마케팅 도구가 될 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: Themed puzzle content like sports can serve as a marketing tool to strengthen emotional connections with target audiences.
key_points: Sports-themed puzzle content from CNET
Provides solutions for NYT Connections game
Themed content targeting specific audience interests

title: AI Bots Don’t Need Markdown Pages
description:
Serving separate versions of a page to people and bots is not new. It's called "cloaking."
The post AI Bots Don’t Need Markdown Pages appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.
summary_ko: AI 봇을 위해 별도의 마크다운 페이지를 제공하는 것은 불필요하다는 주장을 담은 이커머스 업계 기사입니다. 사람과 봇에게 서로 다른 버전의 페이지를 제공하는 것을 '클로킹'이라고 부르며, 이는 새로운 개념이 아니라고 설명합니다. AI 봇 최적화를 위한 웹페이지 구성 방식에 대한 논의를 다루고 있습니다.
summary_en: The article from Practical Ecommerce argues that serving separate markdown pages for AI bots is unnecessary. It explains that serving different page versions to people and bots is called 'cloaking' and is not a new concept. The piece discusses webpage optimization strategies for AI bots.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 AI 봇 최적화를 위한 별도 페이지 개발보다는 기존 페이지의 구조화된 데이터와 메타데이터 개선에 집중해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should focus on improving structured data and metadata of existing pages rather than developing separate pages for AI bot optimization.
key_points: AI bots don't require separate markdown pages
Cloaking (serving different versions) is not new
Questions the necessity of bot-specific page optimization

title: Macy’s year of celebration starts with prom night
description: The department store is preparing for its 100th Thanksgiving Day parade and 50th Fourth of July fireworks display this year.
summary_ko: 메이시스가 올해 100주년 추수감사절 퍼레이드와 50주년 독립기념일 불꽃축제를 기념하는 축제의 해를 프롬나이트로 시작한다고 발표했습니다. 백화점 체인이 대규모 기념행사를 통해 브랜드 가치를 높이고 고객과의 감정적 연결을 강화하려는 전략입니다. 전통적인 오프라인 리테일러의 체험형 마케팅 사례로 주목됩니다.
summary_en: Macy's announced its year of celebration starting with prom night, commemorating its 100th Thanksgiving Day parade and 50th Fourth of July fireworks display. The department store chain aims to enhance brand value and strengthen emotional connections with customers through large-scale commemorative events. This represents experiential marketing by a traditional offline retailer.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드도 기념일이나 마일스톤을 활용한 체험형 이벤트를 통해 고객과의 감정적 유대감을 형성하고 브랜드 충성도를 높일 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can create emotional bonds with customers and increase brand loyalty through experiential events leveraging anniversaries or milestones.
key_points: Macy's celebrates 100th Thanksgiving parade and 50th July 4th fireworks
Year-long celebration campaign starting with prom night
Experiential marketing strategy for brand engagement

title: Claire’s taps Walmart, Macy’s vet as merchandising chief
description: Jillian Cueff is tasked with ensuring the accessories brand remains relevant to Gen Z and Gen Alpha — and their millennial parents.
summary_ko: 액세서리 브랜드 클레어스가 월마트와 메이시스에서 경력을 쌓은 질리안 큐프를 머천다이징 책임자로 영입했다고 발표했습니다. 그녀의 주요 임무는 Z세대와 알파세대, 그리고 그들의 밀레니얼 부모들에게 브랜드가 지속적으로 관련성을 유지하도록 하는 것입니다. 세대 간 어필할 수 있는 상품 전략 구축이 핵심 과제로 제시되었습니다.
summary_en: Accessories brand Claire's has appointed Jillian Cueff, a veteran from Walmart and Macy's, as its new merchandising chief. Her primary task is to ensure the brand remains relevant to Gen Z and Gen Alpha, as well as their millennial parents. Building product strategies that appeal across generations is presented as a key challenge.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 다세대를 아우르는 상품 전략을 위해 각 세대의 선호도와 구매 패턴을 분석하고 이를 반영한 머천다이징 전략을 수립해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must analyze preferences and purchasing patterns of different generations to develop merchandising strategies that appeal across generational segments.
key_points: Claire's hires experienced merchandising executive from major retailers
Focus on maintaining relevance with Gen Z, Gen Alpha, and millennial parents
Multi-generational product strategy as key business challenge

title: Kohl’s launches apparel brand geared toward teens and tweens
description: The private label, dubbed Sea and Skye, includes basics, fleece and graphic T-shirts, as well as dressier styles.
summary_ko: Kohl's가 10대와 12세 전후 고객을 �겨냥한 새로운 의류 브랜드 'Sea and Skye'를 출시했습니다. 이 자체 브랜드는 베이직웨어, 플리스, 그래픽 티셔츠부터 정장 스타일까지 다양한 제품을 포함합니다. Kohl's는 이를 통해 젊은 소비자층을 타겟으로 한 프라이빗 레이블 전략을 강화하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Kohl's has launched a new apparel brand called 'Sea and Skye' targeting teens and tweens. The private label includes basics, fleece, graphic T-shirts, and dressier styles. This represents Kohl's strategy to strengthen its private label offerings for younger consumer demographics.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 특정 연령대를 타겟으로 한 전용 제품 라인 개발을 통해 시장 세분화 전략을 강화할 필요가 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should consider developing dedicated product lines targeting specific age demographics to strengthen market segmentation strategies.
key_points: Kohl's launches 'Sea and Skye' brand for teens and tweens
Private label includes basics to dressy styles
Focus on younger consumer demographics

title: Home Depot launches real-time delivery tracking for large items
description: Handheld devices used by drivers enabled the new feature for shipments of bulkier goods like appliances and lumber.
summary_ko: Home Depot이 대형 상품에 대한 실시간 배송 추적 서비스를 시작했습니다. 배송 기사가 사용하는 핸드헬드 장치를 통해 가전제품과 목재 같은 대형 상품의 배송 상황을 실시간으로 추적할 수 있게 되었습니다. 이는 고객의 배송 경험 개선을 위한 기술적 혁신입니다.
summary_en: Home Depot has launched real-time delivery tracking for large items. Handheld devices used by drivers enable tracking of bulky goods like appliances and lumber. This represents a technological innovation to improve customer delivery experience.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 특히 대형 상품 배송에서 실시간 추적 기능을 도입하여 고객 만족도와 투명성을 높일 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can enhance customer satisfaction and transparency by implementing real-time tracking features, especially for large item deliveries.
key_points: Real-time delivery tracking for large items launched
Handheld devices enable driver-based tracking
Focus on bulky goods like appliances and lumber

title: How Coach cocreated a campaign with Gen Z communities around the world
description: Chief Marketing Officer Joon Silverstein explains how “Explore Your Story” demonstrates the luxury brand’s embrace of social-first marketing.
summary_ko: Coach가 전 세계 Z세대 커뮤니티와 공동으로 'Explore Your Story' 캠페인을 제작했습니다. 최고마케팅책임자 Joon Silverstein은 이 캠페인이 럭셔리 브랜드의 소셜 우선 마케팅 접근법을 보여준다고 설명했습니다. Coach는 Z세대와의 공동 창작을 통해 브랜드 스토리텔링을 혁신하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Coach co-created the 'Explore Your Story' campaign with Gen Z communities worldwide. CMO Joon Silverstein explained this demonstrates the luxury brand's social-first marketing approach. Coach is innovating brand storytelling through co-creation with Gen Z consumers.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 타겟 고객층과의 공동 창작을 통해 더욱 진정성 있고 참여도 높은 마케팅 캠페인을 개발할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can develop more authentic and engaging marketing campaigns through co-creation with their target customer segments.
key_points: Coach co-created campaign with Gen Z communities
Social-first marketing approach for luxury brand
Focus on authentic storytelling and engagement

title: The RealReal hits a milestone: $2 billion in GMV from its 2025 fiscal year
description:
The RealReal said gross merchandise value (GMV) and revenue both climbed at double-digit rates year over year in its fiscal fourth quarter and full year as the luxury resale platform sharply narrowed losses and generated more cash from its core business. Those gains were helped by increased customer activity and new technology tools as the […]
The post The RealReal hits a milestone: $2 billion in GMV from its 2025 fiscal year appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: The RealReal이 2025 회계연도에 GMV 20억 달러 달성이라는 이정표를 세웠습니다. 럭셔리 리세일 플랫폼은 4분기와 연간 모두에서 GMV와 매출이 전년 대비 두 자릿수 성장을 기록했습니다. 고객 활동 증가와 새로운 기술 도구가 이러한 성장을 견인했으며 손실도 크게 줄였습니다.
summary_en: The RealReal achieved a $2 billion GMV milestone in fiscal year 2025. The luxury resale platform recorded double-digit growth in both GMV and revenue year-over-year in Q4 and full year. Increased customer activity and new technology tools drove growth while significantly narrowing losses.
so_what_ko: D2C 리세일 비즈니스는 기술 도구 활용과 고객 참여 증대를 통해 지속가능한 성장과 수익성 개선을 동시에 달성할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C resale businesses can achieve sustainable growth and profitability improvement simultaneously through technology tool utilization and increased customer engagement.
key_points: $2 billion GMV milestone achieved in fiscal 2025
Double-digit growth in GMV and revenue
Technology tools and customer activity drove growth

title: Middle East war poses deepening risks for U.S. B2B ecommerce
description:
Escalating war in the Middle East is not just a geopolitical flashpoint — it is reshaping the logistics landscape that underpins global trade and U.S. B2B ecommerce fulfillment. Countries have shut down airports, carriers are rerouting, insurers are withdrawing coverage, and one of the world’s most critical shipping chokepoints is under acute pressure. The result: […]
The post Middle East war poses deepening risks for U.S. B2B ecommerce appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: 중동 전쟁이 미국 B2B 이커머스에 심화되는 위험을 초래하고 있습니다. 공항 폐쇄, 운송업체 경로 변경, 보험사 보장 철회 등이 발생하고 있으며, 세계 주요 해운 요충지가 심각한 압박을 받고 있습니다. 이는 글로벌 무역과 미국 B2B 이커머스 물류 환경을 재편하고 있습니다.
summary_en: The escalating Middle East war poses deepening risks for U.S. B2B ecommerce. Airport closures, carrier rerouting, and insurer coverage withdrawals are occurring, with critical shipping chokepoints under pressure. This is reshaping the logistics landscape for global trade and U.S. B2B ecommerce fulfillment.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 지정학적 리스크에 대비한 공급망 다각화와 대안 물류 경로 확보가 필요합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands need supply chain diversification and alternative logistics route planning to mitigate geopolitical risks.
key_points: Middle East conflict impacts B2B ecommerce logistics
Airport closures and carrier rerouting occurring
Critical shipping chokepoints under pressure

title: Medline expands AI platform and warehouse robotics
description:
Medline Industries is expanding its use of artificial intelligence (AI) and warehouse robotics as it ramps up growth following its December initial public offering (IPO). On its first earnings call as a public company, CEO James Boyle said Medline is preparing a broader midyear rollout of Mpower, an AI-based supply chain platform developed in collaboration […]
The post Medline expands AI platform and warehouse robotics appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: 의료용품 유통업체 Medline은 IPO 후 성장을 위해 AI 기반 공급망 플랫폼 Mpower와 창고 로봇 기술을 확대하고 있습니다. CEO James Boyle은 연중 Mpower의 광범위한 출시를 준비 중이라고 발표했습니다. 이는 AI와 로봇 기술을 활용한 공급망 최적화 전략의 일환입니다.
summary_en: Medical supplies distributor Medline is expanding its AI-based supply chain platform Mpower and warehouse robotics following its December IPO. CEO James Boyle announced preparations for a broader midyear rollout of the AI platform during the company's first earnings call. This expansion represents Medline's strategy to optimize supply chain operations using AI and robotics technology.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 Medline의 사례를 참고하여 AI 기반 공급망 최적화와 창고 자동화 투자를 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should consider investing in AI-powered supply chain optimization and warehouse automation, following Medline's strategic approach.
key_points: Medline expanding AI platform Mpower and warehouse robotics post-IPO
Broader midyear rollout planned for AI-based supply chain platform
Strategic focus on AI and robotics for operational efficiency

title: Claude vs. ChatGPT: A marketer’s guide to choosing AI
description: “What’s better: Claude or ChatGPT?” is the mind-boggling question every marketer is asking right now. As AI tools become essential to content workflows, understanding the differences between Claude and ChatGPT for marketing can mean the difference between a streamlined operation and a frustrating bottleneck.
summary_ko: 마케터들이 AI 도구 선택에서 Claude와 ChatGPT 중 어떤 것을 사용할지 고민하고 있습니다. AI 도구가 콘텐츠 워크플로우에 필수적이 되면서 두 플랫폼의 차이점 이해가 중요해졌습니다. 올바른 선택이 업무 효율성과 생산성에 직접적인 영향을 미칩니다.
summary_en: Marketers are debating whether to choose Claude or ChatGPT as their primary AI tool for marketing workflows. As AI tools become essential to content creation processes, understanding the differences between these platforms is crucial. The right choice can mean the difference between streamlined operations and workflow bottlenecks.
so_what_ko: D2C 마케터들은 각 AI 도구의 특성을 파악하여 브랜드 콘텐츠 제작과 마케팅 워크플로우에 최적화된 도구를 선택해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C marketers need to evaluate each AI tool's capabilities to select the optimal platform for brand content creation and marketing workflows.
key_points: Growing debate between Claude vs ChatGPT for marketing use
AI tools becoming essential for content workflows
Tool selection impacts operational efficiency significantly

title: AI marketing predictions that will shape 2026
description: Marketing is set for its most transformative year in decades, according to major AI predictions for 2026. Currently, marketers struggle with fragmented customer journeys, declining attention spans, rising acquisition costs, and failed campaigns. Using AI in marketing will redefine how brands connect with consumers by using real-time data processing and predictive analytics.
summary_ko: 2026년은 마케팅 분야에서 수십 년 만에 가장 변혁적인 해가 될 것으로 예측됩니다. 현재 마케터들은 분산된 고객 여정, 줄어드는 관심 시간, 증가하는 획득 비용 등의 문제에 직면하고 있습니다. AI는 실시간 데이터 처리와 예측 분석을 통해 브랜드와 소비자 연결 방식을 재정의할 예정입니다.
summary_en: 2026 is predicted to be marketing's most transformative year in decades according to major AI predictions. Marketers currently face challenges with fragmented customer journeys, declining attention spans, and rising acquisition costs. AI will redefine how brands connect with consumers through real-time data processing and predictive analytics.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 실시간 데이터 분석과 예측 AI를 활용하여 고객 획득 비용을 줄이고 개인화된 고객 경험을 제공해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must leverage real-time data analytics and predictive AI to reduce customer acquisition costs and deliver personalized customer experiences.
key_points: 2026 predicted as most transformative year for marketing
Current challenges include fragmented journeys and rising costs
AI to revolutionize brand-consumer connections via real-time analytics

title: OpenAI’s “compromise” with the Pentagon is what Anthropic feared
description: On February 28, OpenAI announced it had reached a deal that will allow the US military to use its technologies in classified settings. CEO Sam Altman said the negotiations, which the company began pursuing only after the Pentagon’s public reprimand of Anthropic, were “definitely rushed.” In its announcements, OpenAI took great pains to say that…
summary_ko: OpenAI가 미군이 분류된 환경에서 자사 기술을 사용할 수 있도록 하는 펜타곤과의 협정을 발표했습니다. CEO Sam Altman은 Anthropic에 대한 펜타곤의 공개 질책 이후 시작된 협상이 급하게 진행되었다고 말했습니다. 이는 Anthropic이 우려했던 상황이 현실화된 것입니다.
summary_en: OpenAI announced a deal allowing the US military to use its technologies in classified settings. CEO Sam Altman said the negotiations, which began after the Pentagon's public reprimand of Anthropic, were definitely rushed. This represents the compromise situation that Anthropic had feared would occur.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 AI 기술 제공업체의 정부 및 군사 협력 정책 변화가 향후 서비스 이용에 미칠 영향을 모니터링해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies should monitor how AI providers' government and military partnerships may impact future service availability and policies.
key_points: OpenAI reached deal for Pentagon to use AI in classified settings
Negotiations were rushed following Pentagon's criticism of Anthropic
Represents the compromise scenario Anthropic had warned against

title: I checked out one of the biggest anti-AI protests yet
description: Pull the plug! Pull the plug! Stop the slop! Stop the slop! For a few hours this Saturday, February 28, I watched as a couple of hundred anti-AI protesters marched through London’s King’s Cross tech hub, home to the UK headquarters of OpenAI, Meta, and Google DeepMind, chanting slogans and waving signs. The march was…
summary_ko: 런던 킹스크로스 테크 허브에서 수백 명의 반AI 시위대가 'Pull the plug! Stop the slop!' 구호를 외치며 행진했습니다. 이 지역은 OpenAI, Meta, Google DeepMind의 영국 본사가 위치한 곳입니다. 2월 28일 토요일에 진행된 이 시위는 지금까지 가장 큰 규모의 반AI 항의 시위 중 하나였습니다.
summary_en: Hundreds of anti-AI protesters marched through London's King's Cross tech hub chanting 'Pull the plug! Stop the slop!' on Saturday, February 28. The area houses the UK headquarters of OpenAI, Meta, and Google DeepMind. This demonstration was one of the biggest anti-AI protests to date.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 AI 기술 도입 시 소비자들의 반AI 정서와 우려사항을 고려하여 투명한 커뮤니케이션 전략을 수립해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must develop transparent communication strategies that address consumer anti-AI sentiment and concerns when implementing AI technologies.
key_points: Major anti-AI protest in London's King's Cross tech hub
Targeted area with OpenAI, Meta, and Google DeepMind offices
Represents growing public resistance to AI development

title: Anthropic upgrades Claude’s memory to attract AI switchers
description:
Anthropic is making it easier to switch to its Claude AI from other chatbots with an update that brings Claude's memory feature to users on the free plan, along with a new prompt and dedicated tool for importing data from other chatbots. These upgrades could allow users who have been using rivals like OpenAI's ChatGPT or Google's Gemini to quickly copy the data their preferred AI has collected on them and bring it over to Anthropic's chatbot. That way, they don't have to "start over" teaching Claude the context and history their previous chatbot already knows.  
The option to import and export memories from Claude has been available since O …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: Anthropic이 Claude AI의 기억 기능을 무료 사용자에게도 제공하고, 타 AI 챗봇에서 데이터 가져오기 기능을 추가했습니다. 이를 통해 ChatGPT나 Gemini 사용자들이 기존 대화 기록과 맥락을 Claude로 쉽게 옮겨올 수 있게 되었습니다. AI 서비스 간 사용자 이탈을 방지하고 새로운 사용자 유입을 위한 전략으로 해석됩니다.
summary_en: Anthropic has upgraded Claude's memory feature to free users and added tools for importing data from other AI chatbots. This allows users of ChatGPT or Gemini to easily transfer their conversation history and context to Claude without starting over. The move appears to be a strategic effort to attract users from competing AI services.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 고객의 AI 도구 전환을 용이하게 하는 기능 개발을 통해 경쟁 우위를 확보할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can gain competitive advantage by developing features that make it easier for customers to switch AI tools and import their data seamlessly.
key_points: Claude memory feature now available to free users
New import tool allows data transfer from competing AI chatbots
Strategy to reduce switching barriers and attract users from competitors

title: Apple might use Google servers to store data for its upgraded AI Siri
description:
Apple has asked Google to look into "setting up servers" for a new version of Siri that's Gemini-powered and meets Apple's privacy requirements, The Information reports. Apple had already announced in January that Google's Gemini AI models would help power the upgraded version of Siri it delayed last year, but The Information's report indicates Apple might lean even more on Google so it can catch up in AI.
The original partnership announcement said that "the next generation of Apple Foundation Models will be based on Google's Gemini models and cloud technology," and that the models would "help power future Apple Intelligence features," incl …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: Apple이 Google과 협력하여 Gemini 기반의 새로운 Siri를 위한 서버 설정을 논의하고 있다고 보도되었습니다. 이미 발표된 파트너십에서 한 걸음 더 나아가 Google의 클라우드 인프라에 더욱 의존할 가능성이 제기되었습니다. AI 분야에서의 경쟁 격차를 따라잡기 위한 Apple의 전략적 움직임으로 분석됩니다.
summary_en: Apple is reportedly discussing with Google about setting up servers for a new Gemini-powered Siri that meets Apple's privacy requirements. This goes beyond their previously announced partnership, suggesting Apple may rely even more heavily on Google's cloud infrastructure. The move appears to be Apple's strategic effort to catch up in the AI competition.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 AI 역량 부족 시 전략적 파트너십을 통해 빠르게 시장 경쟁력을 확보하는 방법을 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies should consider strategic partnerships to quickly gain market competitiveness when lacking internal AI capabilities.
key_points: Apple exploring deeper Google cloud infrastructure dependency for AI
Partnership extends beyond previously announced Gemini integration
Strategy to accelerate AI development and catch up with competitors

title: AI-generated art can’t be copyrighted after Supreme Court declines to review the rule
description:
The US Supreme Court has declined to hear a case over whether AI-generated art can obtain a copyright, as reported earlier by Reuters. The Monday decision comes after Stephen Thaler, a computer scientist from Missouri, appealed a court's decision to uphold a ruling that found AI-generated art can't be copyrighted.
In 2019, the US Copyright Office rejected Thaler's request to copyright an image, called A Recent Entrance to Paradise, on behalf of an algorithm he created. The Copyright Office reviewed the decision in 2022 and determined that the image doesn't include "human authorship," disqualifying it from copyright protection. 
After Thale …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: 미국 대법원이 AI 생성 예술작품의 저작권 인정 여부에 대한 재검토를 거부했습니다. 이로써 AI가 생성한 작품은 '인간의 창작'이 아니라는 이유로 저작권 보호를 받을 수 없다는 기존 판결이 유지됩니다. 2019년 스티븐 탈러가 자신의 알고리즘이 생성한 작품에 대한 저작권 등록을 거부당한 사건이 최종 확정되었습니다.
summary_en: The US Supreme Court has declined to review whether AI-generated art can obtain copyright protection. This upholds the existing ruling that AI-created works cannot be copyrighted due to lack of 'human authorship.' The decision finalizes the 2019 case where Stephen Thaler was denied copyright registration for an algorithm-generated image.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 AI 생성 콘텐츠 사용 시 저작권 보호가 불가능함을 인지하고, 브랜드 보호 전략을 재검토해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must recognize that AI-generated content cannot be copyrighted and should review their brand protection strategies accordingly.
key_points: Supreme Court upholds ruling that AI art cannot be copyrighted
Human authorship requirement remains for copyright protection
Implications for commercial use of AI-generated creative content

title: Nvidia’s spending $4 billion on photonics to stay ahead of the curve in AI
description:
Nvidia announced on Monday that it's investing $2 billion each into Lumentum and Coherent, which are both developing photonics technology for data centers, like optical transceivers, circuit switches, and lasers, which are used to move data at high speeds over long distances. Their tech could improve energy efficiency, data transfer speeds, and bandwidth in future AI data centers, after Nvidia already capitalized on its 2020 acquisition of the network hardware company Mellanox to beef up NVLink and increase the amount of data moving between its GPUs. 
For Lumentum, the nonexclusive multiyear deal includes a "multibillion purchase commitment …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: Nvidia가 AI 데이터센터의 미래를 위해 포토닉스 기술 회사들에 총 40억 달러를 투자한다고 발표했습니다. Lumentum과 Coherent에 각각 20억 달러씩 투자하여 광학 트랜시버, 회로 스위치, 레이저 등의 기술을 확보합니다. 이 기술들은 데이터 전송 속도, 에너지 효율성, 대역폭을 향상시켜 AI 데이터센터 성능을 크게 개선할 것으로 예상됩니다.
summary_en: Nvidia announced a $4 billion investment in photonics technology companies to advance AI data center capabilities. The company is investing $2 billion each in Lumentum and Coherent to develop optical transceivers, circuit switches, and lasers. These technologies are expected to significantly improve data transfer speeds, energy efficiency, and bandwidth in future AI data centers.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 AI 인프라의 급격한 발전으로 인한 비용 효율성과 성능 향상 혜택을 전략적으로 활용해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies should strategically leverage the cost efficiency and performance improvements from rapid AI infrastructure advancements.
key_points: $4 billion investment in photonics technology for AI data centers
Focus on improving data transfer speeds and energy efficiency
Strategic positioning for next-generation AI infrastructure

title: How OpenAI caved to the Pentagon on AI surveillance
description:
On Friday evening, amidst fallout from a standoff between the Department of Defense and Anthropic, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman announced that his own company had successfully negotiated new terms with the Pentagon. The US government had just moved to blacklist Anthropic for standing firm on two red lines for military use: no mass surveillance of Americans and no lethal autonomous weapons (or AI systems with the power to kill targets without human oversight). Altman, however, implied that he'd found a unique way to keep those same limits in OpenAI's contract.
"Two of our most important safety principles are prohibitions on domestic mass surveillan …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: 미국 국방부가 Anthropic을 블랙리스트에 올린 가운데, OpenAI CEO 샘 알트만이 펜타곤과의 새로운 계약 조건을 협상했다고 발표했습니다. Anthropic은 미국인 대량 감시와 자율살상무기 사용을 거부했으나, OpenAI는 이러한 안전 원칙을 유지하면서도 국방부와 협력할 방법을 찾았다고 주장합니다. AI 기업들의 군사 활용에 대한 윤리적 입장차이가 드러났습니다.
summary_en: While the Department of Defense blacklisted Anthropic, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman announced successful negotiations for new Pentagon contract terms. Anthropic refused to compromise on mass surveillance of Americans and lethal autonomous weapons, but OpenAI claims to have found ways to cooperate with the military while maintaining these safety principles. This reveals ethical differences among AI companies regarding military applications.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 AI 기술 도입 시 공급업체의 윤리적 원칙과 정부 협력 방식을 고려한 신중한 선택이 필요합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands need to carefully consider AI suppliers' ethical principles and government cooperation approaches when adopting AI technologies.
key_points: OpenAI negotiated new terms with Pentagon while Anthropic was blacklisted
Ethical differences on military AI applications between companies
Safety principles around surveillance and autonomous weapons remain contentious

title: X adds ‘Paid Partnership’ labels so creators can ditch the hashtags
description: The new labels comply with regulations and allow creators to be more transparent with their followers.
summary_ko: X(트위터)가 크리에이터들이 해시태그 대신 사용할 수 있는 '유료 파트너십' 라벨 기능을 추가했습니다. 새로운 라벨은 규제 요구사항을 준수하며 크리에이터가 팔로워들에게 더 투명하게 소통할 수 있도록 합니다. 이는 인플루언서 마케팅의 투명성을 높이는 중요한 변화입니다.
summary_en: X has introduced 'Paid Partnership' labels that allow creators to replace hashtag disclosures. The new labels comply with regulations and enable creators to be more transparent with their followers. This represents a significant shift toward improved transparency in influencer marketing.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 인플루언서 협업 시 더 명확한 공개 표시로 신뢰도를 높일 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage clearer disclosure mechanisms to build trust in influencer partnerships.
key_points: X introduces new 'Paid Partnership' labels for creators
Labels replace traditional hashtag disclosures
Improves transparency and regulatory compliance

title: Telemundo Kicks World Cup Marketing Into High Gear: Sweeping Coverage, New Campaign
description: Telemundo reveals 700 hours of coverage, 104 matches, and a new campaign to reach viewers.
summary_ko: 텔레문도가 월드컵 마케팅을 본격화하며 700시간의 방송 커버리지와 104경기 중계를 발표했습니다. 시청자 도달을 위한 새로운 캠페인도 함께 공개되었습니다. 대규모 스포츠 이벤트를 활용한 포괄적 마케팅 전략을 보여줍니다.
summary_en: Telemundo has ramped up World Cup marketing with 700 hours of coverage and 104 match broadcasts. The network also revealed a new campaign designed to reach viewers. This demonstrates a comprehensive marketing strategy leveraging major sporting events.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 대형 스포츠 이벤트 기간 중 집중적인 마케팅 캠페인으로 브랜드 인지도를 극대화할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can maximize brand awareness through intensive marketing campaigns during major sporting events.
key_points: Telemundo announces 700 hours of World Cup coverage
104 matches to be broadcast
New campaign launched to maximize viewer reach

title: Paramount Scores a Top Sports Ads Exec From Amazon Ahead of Upfront
description: Amazon Ads confirmed Danielle Carney has left the company.
summary_ko: 파라마운트가 업프론트를 앞두고 아마존에서 스포츠 광고 전문가 다니엘 카니를 영입했습니다. 아마존 광고 부서는 카니의 퇴사를 확인했습니다. 스포츠 광고 시장에서의 인재 경쟁이 치열해지고 있음을 보여줍니다.
summary_en: Paramount has recruited sports advertising executive Danielle Carney from Amazon ahead of the upfront season. Amazon Ads confirmed Carney's departure from the company. This shows intensifying talent competition in the sports advertising market.
so_what_ko: 스포츠 광고 시장의 성장으로 D2C 브랜드도 스포츠 마케팅 전문성을 강화해야 합니다.
so_what_en: Growing sports advertising market requires D2C brands to strengthen their sports marketing expertise.
key_points: Paramount hires Amazon's sports ads executive Danielle Carney
Move comes ahead of upfront presentations
Indicates competitive talent acquisition in sports advertising

title: EXCLUSIVE: A New Pitch Deck Reveals X Is Using Grok to Sell Brand Safety
description: The Elon Musk-owned platform is pitching advertisers on Grok for brand safety—just weeks after the chatbot flooded the platform with nonconsensual deepfakes of real users.
summary_ko: X가 브랜드 안전성 확보를 위해 AI 챗봇 그록(Grok)을 활용한다는 내용이 새로운 피치덱에서 공개되었습니다. 이는 그록이 실제 사용자들의 무동의 딥페이크로 플랫폼을 범람시킨 지 불과 몇 주 후의 일입니다. 브랜드 안전성과 AI 기술 활용 사이의 모순이 드러나고 있습니다.
summary_en: A new pitch deck reveals X is using AI chatbot Grok to sell brand safety to advertisers. This comes just weeks after Grok flooded the platform with nonconsensual deepfakes of real users. The contradiction between brand safety promises and AI technology misuse is becoming apparent.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 AI 기술을 활용한 플랫폼의 브랜드 안전성 주장을 신중히 검토하고 자체 모니터링 체계를 구축해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must carefully evaluate brand safety claims from AI-powered platforms and establish their own monitoring systems.
key_points: X pitches Grok AI for brand safety solutions
Recent controversy over nonconsensual deepfakes
Contradiction between safety promises and platform issues

title: Anthropic Is Cashing In on OpenAI’s Pentagon Deal
description: As 'Cancel ChatGPT' goes viral, Anthropic is promoting a free tool that lets defectors bring their chat history with them.
summary_ko: OpenAI의 펜타곤 계약으로 'ChatGPT 취소' 운동이 확산되는 가운데, Anthropic이 이를 기회로 삼고 있습니다. Anthropic은 ChatGPT 이탈자들이 채팅 기록을 가져올 수 있는 무료 도구를 홍보하고 있습니다. AI 플랫폼 간 경쟁이 정치적 이슈와 결합되어 심화되고 있습니다.
summary_en: As 'Cancel ChatGPT' goes viral due to OpenAI's Pentagon deal, Anthropic is capitalizing on the opportunity. Anthropic is promoting a free tool that allows ChatGPT defectors to bring their chat history with them. Competition between AI platforms is intensifying with political issues.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 AI 서비스 제공업체의 정치적 논란을 모니터링하고 대안 솔루션을 준비해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should monitor political controversies of AI service providers and prepare alternative solutions.
key_points: Anthropic capitalizes on anti-ChatGPT sentiment
Free tool offered for chat history migration
Political issues affecting AI platform competition
